creator: asami@vader.cs.berkeley.edu
text:
* Only changes files/patch-aa, from unified-diff style to context-diff style.

Um, that's not what I meant.  Please take a "diff -ru skk.old skk"
where skk.old is the directory for ports-current/japanese/skk (version
8.6) and skk is your new version 9.6.  (And I'm expecting you to check
the diff before sending it over, by the way...there seems to be a lot
of changes from 8.6 that I'm not sure about.)

Satoshi
